text: Now let me also run clippy on both files to make sure they pass the project's lint requirements.

tool_uses.name: Bash
tool_uses.input: {"command": "cd /Users/gladyscavero/Documents/PEOPL/GitHub/claw-code/rust && cargo clippy --example session_diff --test session_diff_test -- -D warnings 2>&1", "description": "Run clippy on both new files", "timeout": 120000}
